About Me

Let me tell you a few things...

BIO

I'm a Software Engineer with experience in building Professional-Looking eCommerce websites. Develop software solutions for client's custom business requirements.

With Technical Skills in:

  • Web Service APIs
  • Web Apps (React and Angular)
  • Fully-Responsive Websites
  • Drupal, Wordpress, and Laravel

With positive attitude and deep desire to build websites that last.

True Apex

Software Engineer

  • Build Enterprise-Level eCommerce websites using Drupal Commerce.
  • Build Fully-Responsive websites from PSD.
  • Develop custom Drupal themes and modules.

Bridge Technology Partners

Software Engineer

  • Developed Web Service APIs.
  • Embrace Test-Driven Development methodology to assure code quality and faster deployment.

Elementz Interactive

Software Engineer

  • Develop an Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) system for clients.
  • Develop Web Service APIs using CodeIgniter and Laravel Web Framework.
  • Develop Single-Page web applications.

Infocus Multimedia and Business Solutions

Web Developer

  • Lead in developing eCommerce websites.
  • Customize Drupal modules to function as per business requirements.

A5 Project

Web Developer

  • Develop websites ranging from personal blogging to ecommerce websites.
  • Fix design issues and install added features on client’s websites.

Teradyne Philippines Ltd.

Board Repair Specialist

  • Quality repair electronic boards, solder/de-solder components.
  • Troubleshoot and quality test electronic boards using Teradyne's Automatic Test Equipment (ATE).
